EmailTemplate.name: SDR 2
EmailTemplate.subject: SDR Reminder 2
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Booking__c.Primary_Applicant_Name__c}
Greetings from Runwal!
This is a gentle reminder to register your unit {!Booking__c.Unit_No__r.Name} in {!Booking__c.Project__r.Name}.
You are requested to kindly transfer the Stamp Duty & Registration payments immediately, along with the Name Confirmation Letter (if not sent already).
In case of availing a home loan kindly share the sanction letter for our reference and preparing the relevant documentation.
Please feel free to revert in case of any further assistance.
Thanks, Runwal Team
PS: Please ignore the above if the same has been submitted/paid.
